# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Authentication
Description: A plugin that handles user registration and login with password hashing.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Make sure WordPress is included in the file to use functions like wpdb
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit; // Exit if accessed directly
}

global $wpdb;
$table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_auth'; 

// Register a new user
function registerUser($username, $password) {
    global $wpdb;
    $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . "user_auth";
    
    // Hash the password
    $hashed_pw = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_BCRYPT);
  
    // Insert new user data into the database 
    $wpdb->insert( $table_name, array('username' => $username, 'password' => $hashed_pw));
}

// Authenticate a user
function authenticateUser($username, $password) {
    global $wpdb;
    $table_name = $wpdb<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>.prefix . "user_auth";
  
    // Get the password for this username from the database 
    $row = $wpdb->get_row("SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE username = '$username'");
    
    if ($row) {
        // Verify the password 
        $verified = password_verify($password, $row->password);
      
        return $verified;
    } else {
        return false;
    }
}
?>
